## 📋 FOR HUMANS (What Happened)

**Primary Topic:** Integrating image fields from Word document extraction into test data to match template expectations

**What We Built:**
- Added 37 image field paths to northBattlefordTestData.ts (commit 15478b8)
- Mapped subject-photo-1 through subject-photo-24 (24 fields)
- Mapped comp1-3 photos, location maps, zoning map, rental comp photos
- Fixed naming mismatch (removed -url suffix to match template)

**What We Discovered:**
- **Template expects 44 image field IDs** - Discovered via grep on preview-wrapper.html
- **Naming convention mismatch** - Template: {{comp1-photo}}, Test data: comp1-photo-url
- **IMAGE-MANIFEST.json exists** - Another agent extracted 50 fields from Word doc
- **89 images available locally** - Transferred from other agent's extraction work
- **11 fields still missing** - Need Word doc agent to continue extraction
- **Field coverage: 84%** - 37 of 44 template fields now have paths

**What Changed:**
- northBattlefordTestData.ts: 1,075 lines → 1,130 lines (+56 lines, +37 fields)
- Template image coverage: 0% → 84%
- Image path references: Valcre CDN URLs → Local extracted-images folder
- Field naming: Added fields without -url suffix to match template

**Decisions Made:**

**Decision:** Use IMAGE-MANIFEST.json as source of truth for image paths
- **Why:** Created by Word doc specialist agent with proper mappings
- **Impact:** All image paths now reference local extracted-images folder

**Decision:** Add fields without -url suffix to match template expectations
- **Why:** Template uses {{comp1-photo}}, not {{comp1-photo-url}}
- **Impact:** Template will now find image fields when interpolating

**Decision:** Keep existing -url fields for backwards compatibility
- **Why:** Don't break any existing code that might reference -url fields
- **Impact:** Test data now has both formats (comp1-photo AND comp1-photo-url)

**Decision:** Wait for Word doc agent to extract remaining 11 missing images
- **Why:** Word doc agent has expertise in extraction and proper mapping
- **Impact:** Don't create placeholder images, wait for real source

## 💡 KEY LEARNINGS

### What Worked Well
- ✅ **Cross-agent coordination** - Leveraged Word doc agent's extraction work
- ✅ **IMAGE-MANIFEST.json as source** - Clear mapping from Word doc to field IDs
- ✅ **Grep for template validation** - Quickly found all 44 expected image fields
- ✅ **Systematic addition** - Added fields with clear comments and organization

### Patterns to Reuse
- **Validate template expectations first** - Use grep to find all {{field-id}} patterns
- **Check for naming mismatches** - Template may use different convention than data source
- **Leverage other agents' work** - Don't re-extract if another agent has done it
- **Document waiting dependencies** - Clear blockers section for cross-agent handoffs

### Architecture Understanding Gained
- **Template uses 44 image field IDs** - Subject photos, comp photos, maps, branding
- **Test data structure** - Simple key-value Record<string, string | number | string[]>
- **Image path format** - Absolute paths from project root (/docs/...)
- **Naming patterns** - subject-photo-{N}, comp{N}-photo, map-{type}, img-{type}-{N}

### Statistics Worth Remembering
- **Total template image fields:** 44
- **Fields added this session:** 37
- **Coverage achieved:** 84%
- **Still missing:** 11 fields
- **Extracted images available:** 89 files
- **Test data file growth:** +56 lines (1,075 → 1,130)
